pattern: ENOENT: no such file or directory
root_cause: Import path error or missing dependency file
resolution: Check file path, run npm install, verify tsconfig paths

root_cause: Missing npm dependency or wrong import path
resolution: npm install <package>, check package.json, verify import spelling

pattern: Type error: Property .* does not exist on type
root_cause: TypeScript type mismatch, missing type declaration, or API change
resolution: Check type definitions, update @types packages, add type assertion if safe

root_cause: Required service (DB/Redis/API) is not running
resolution: Start the service, check docker-compose, verify environment config

root_cause: Port already occupied by another process
resolution: Kill existing process (lsof -i :PORT), use different port, check .env

root_cause: Async function not awaited, mock not configured, or null propagation
resolution: Add await, check mock setup, add null checks

pattern: Timeout - Async callback was not invoked
root_cause: Promise never resolves, missing done() call, or slow external dependency
resolution: Increase timeout, mock external deps, check Promise chain

root_cause: Concurrent edits to same file/lines across branches
resolution: Manual merge resolution, prefer rebase workflow for linear history

root_cause: Wrong JWT secret, expired token, or malformed token format
resolution: Check JWT_SECRET env var, verify token format, check clock sync

root_cause: CORS configuration missing or misconfigured for the requesting origin
resolution: Add origin to CORS whitelist, check proxy config, verify API gateway

root_cause: Memory leak, processing oversized dataset, or unbounded cache growth
resolution: Increase Node.js memory limit, add streaming, implement cache eviction

root_cause: Missing database index, N+1 query, or full table scan
resolution: Add index, use eager loading/joins, paginate results

root_cause: Binary dependency compiled for wrong platform/architecture
resolution: Rebuild native modules (npm rebuild), check Node.js version match

root_cause: Container memory limit too low for application needs
resolution: Increase container memory, optimize app memory usage, add swap

root_cause: Circular lock dependencies or long-running transactions
resolution: Review lock ordering, reduce transaction scope, add lock timeout

root_cause: API rate limit exceeded, missing backoff logic
resolution: Implement exponential backoff, add request queuing, cache responses

root_cause: Upstream service down, health check failing, or deployment in progress
resolution: Check upstream service health, implement circuit breaker, add retry

root_cause: Attempting to insert record with existing unique field value
resolution: Add upsert logic, check before insert, handle constraint error gracefully

root_cause: Database schema out of sync with code, missing migration run
resolution: Run pending migrations, check migration order, verify schema

root_cause: Connection leak, pool too small, or connections not returned
resolution: Add connection pooling, ensure proper cleanup/finally, increase pool size
